# Instructor Bio

Dr. Maya Chen designs practical learning experiences at the intersection of
climate data, civic communication, and public-interest analytics. Her workshops
have supported local government teams, newsroom collaborators, and nonprofit
research staff who need to turn technical evidence into decisions people can
understand and act on.

For this spring studio she is responsible for the core teaching arc, critique
format, and final action-brief review. Guest contributors may join selected
sessions for examples from resilience planning and community outreach, but the
course is organized around Dr. Chen's facilitation and feedback.
